testcase.name: windowHandleTest

error.message: Remote browser did not respond to getCurrentUrl Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: driver.version: RemoteWebDriver
